events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the staged thread sealant isn't gas-rated (violates IFGC 403.10.2 / NFPA 54 §6.13.2), which risks a leak on this fuel-gas system. Marked `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, with corrective steps — reject the sealant, use a UL/CSA-listed gas-rated pipe joint compound or listed yellow gas tape, remake the joint, and leak-test before returning to service.
